rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §29.094 governs a time-limited reading intervention pilot program (2007-2009 school years) funded from appropriations under §28.0211. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax revenue.
quote: Notwithstanding any other law, the commissioner shall provide funding for the pilot program using not more than $6 million of funding appropriated for purposes of Section 28.0211.
_note: No nexus between Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption and this pilot program section.
